meaning: adj.中和酸性的,抗酸性的n.抗酸剂
examples: Anybody got any antacid or bicarbonate of soda?
Oh, here's some antacid. Have you ever tried this?
The mixture also works as an antacid, thanks to the baking soda.
Send your child to college with painkillers, antacid, and some health care smarts.
That probably explains why antacid sales surge by around 20% following the game.
